examples: Most of us have this ability to reduce ourself.
But, the truth is, there will always be some people more successful than ourself.
It is important to know our good and bad points because this knowledge will help us to improve ourself.
"We pride ourself on getting defensive stops and we didn't do that tonight, " Brooks said.
And we will take away some further credit for the fact we could not remove it exactly this way ourself.
